summary: Salesforce — usage metrics dashboard by object type
description_md:
As a workspace-admin, I want to view Salesforce usage metrics broken down by object type (Leads, Opportunities, Accounts, etc.) so that I can identify high-volume data sources and optimize connector resource allocation.

## Background

The Salesforce connector ingests multiple object types with varying record volumes across tenant workspaces. Understanding per-object usage patterns helps workspace admins plan capacity and troubleshoot performance issues.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Dashboard displays a bar chart showing record counts grouped by Salesforce object type for the selected time range (last 7, 30, or 90 days).
2. Each object type row shows total records synced, last sync timestamp, and sync status (success/failed/partial).
3. Clicking an object type filters the detailed sync log to show only records from that object.
4. Export button allows downloading the usage metrics as CSV for reporting purposes.

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Will need to coordinate with the Salesforce connector team to ensure object type metadata is exposed in the sync events.
